welcome.title: Welcome to Mission Control
welcome.description: Your station for AI agents. When agents dock here, they gain persistent memory, task management, coordinated workflows, and full observability. We've scanned your setup — here's what's online.
welcome.monitorClaude: Monitor Claude Code sessions on this machine

interfaceMode.title: Choose Your Station Layout
interfaceMode.description: Essential shows the core panels operators need most. Full unlocks every system on the station — memory, automation, security auditing, and more. You can switch anytime.
interfaceMode.essentialDescription: Streamlined ops — the panels you'll use daily: fleet overview, agents, tasks, chat, activity feed, logs, and settings.
interfaceMode.fullDescription: Full station access — adds memory browser, cron scheduling, webhooks, alerts, security audit, cost tracking, and gateway config.

hero.badge: Powered by OpenClaw on Google Cloud Platform
hero.description: Get your own AI assistant running in the cloud. It reads your files, handles your tasks, connects to Google Drive and Notion, and works around the clock. No tech skills needed. Just results.

steps.title: 3 steps, that's it
steps.step1Desc: Sign up with Google or email. Takes 10 seconds.
steps.step2Desc: Choose Starter ($20), Pro ($60), or Max ($180). Cancel anytime.
steps.step3Desc: Your AI assistant starts automatically. Begin chatting in under a minute.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: A complete AI assistant platform with enterprise-grade security, built for people who want results without the complexity.
features.alwaysOnlineDesc: Your AI assistant runs 24/7 in the cloud. It's always ready when you need it.
features.isolationDesc: Each user gets their own private space and keys. Your data never touches anyone else's.
features.gdriveDesc: Connect your Google Drive with one click. Your assistant can read, search, and import files directly.
features.notionDesc: Sync your Notion workspace. Your assistant can read pages, query databases, and stay up-to-date.
features.skillsDesc: Extend your assistant with custom skills and tool integrations. Make it truly yours.
features.backupsDesc: Automatic daily backups to the cloud. Restore anytime with one click.

security.title: Enterprise-grade security
security.subtitle: Built on Google Cloud Platform with the same infrastructure used by Fortune 500 companies.

cta.title: Ready to get your AI assistant?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of users who trust OrgOfClaws to run their AI assistants in the cloud.

comparison.title: Why OrgOfClaws?
comparison.subtitle: Setting up an AI assistant yourself is painful. We handle everything so you don't have to.
comparison.without_setup: Install Node.js, Docker, configure ports, deal with terminal errors...
comparison.without_time: 4-6 hours of setup before you can even start using it.
comparison.without_updates: Manual updates and maintenance every time there's a new version.
comparison.without_data: Data stored on your laptop — lost if it crashes or gets stolen.
comparison.with_setup: Click 'Get Started' and your assistant is ready.
comparison.with_time: Ready in 30 seconds. No setup, no downloads, no terminal.
comparison.with_updates: Automatic updates, zero maintenance. Always on the latest version.
comparison.with_data: Cloud storage with daily backups. Your data is safe and always accessible.

useCases.title: What can your AI assistant do?
useCases.subtitle: From emails to code reviews, your assistant handles the tasks that eat up your day.
useCases.emailDesc: Auto-classify incoming emails, draft replies, flag urgent messages, and clean up your inbox.
useCases.researchDesc: Read your Google Drive and Notion docs, summarize long documents, and extract key insights.
useCases.taskDesc: Schedule meetings, track your to-dos, set reminders, and automate repetitive workflows.
useCases.codeDesc: Review pull requests, debug errors, explain code, and help you ship faster with fewer bugs.
useCases.dataDesc: Process spreadsheets, generate reports, find trends, and turn raw data into clear insights.
useCases.messagingDesc: Connect to Telegram, Discord, and Slack. Talk to your assistant wherever you already work.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
faq.a1: OrgOfClaws is a managed cloud hosting service for your personal AI assistant. We handle all the infrastructure — servers, security, backups, updates — so you can just use your AI without dealing with any technical complexity.
faq.a2: No, not at all. Everything is set up automatically when you create your account. You don't need to install anything, configure any servers, or know how to code. If you can use a web browser, you can use OrgOfClaws.
faq.a3: We support all major AI models including Google Gemini, Anthropic Claude, OpenAI GPT, and more. You bring your own API keys, and we handle the integration. Switch between models anytime.
faq.a4: Absolutely. Every user gets an isolated container with AES-256 encrypted storage. Your data is backed up daily to Google Cloud Storage, encrypted in transit with TLS 1.3, and never shared with other users or used for training.
faq.a5: Yes. No contracts, no lock-in. Cancel with one click from your dashboard. When you cancel, your data is preserved for 30 days in case you change your mind, then securely deleted.
faq.q6: How is this different from ChatGPT?
faq.a6: ChatGPT is a chat window. OrgOfClaws gives you your own AI that remembers everything, connects to your real tools (Drive, Notion, Telegram), runs custom automations, and works 24/7 even when you're offline. It's a personal AI employee, not just a chatbot.

trust.title: Built on technology you can trust

footer.tagline: Managed OpenClaw hosting on GCP. Powered by Landing AI.
